title: Dove
subTitle: Anoop and Aditi love each other but face an unexpected obstacle when Anoop gets charged with murder. Meanwhile, Kumar and Sona, who share an intimate relationship, try to overcome their challenges.

title: Bhale Jodi
subTitle: Gautham and Nitya meet at a mutual friend's wedding and immediately he falls for her. However, complications arise when Gautham realises that Nithya is engaged.

title: Filler
subTitle: Bringing the best in cinema.

title: Teleshopping
subTitle: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

title: Thipparalli Tharlegalu
subTitle: Three men try to find ways to settle their loans. They soon find bags of money mysteriously with which they plan to help the society.

title: Babu Bangaram
subTitle: A soft-spoken police officer helps a woman as a pretext for finding and arresting her father, who is on the run from the law, but he winds up falling for her.

title: Kalyana Mantapa
subTitle: Shankara plans to demolish a house in order to erect a wedding pavilion.But hilarious consequences ensue when the woman residing in the house protest against Shankara.

title: Kourava
subTitle: When a man falls in love with a teacher, she rejects his advances as she loves another man. However, he continues to pursue her and tries to win her heart.

title: Nandi
subTitle: Intending to start a new life, a dreaded murderer joins a law college to complete his graduation. However, his past returns to haunt him as he embarks on a path towards reformation.

title: Buguri
subTitle: Krishna, a young man, is engaged and set to marry Ishanya, a family friend. However, things get complicated when he cannot get over a former lover and decides to go on a search for her.

title: Paduvarahalli Pandavaru
subTitle: A rural retelling of the Mahabharata epic focusing on the conflict between a zamindar and five young men, mirroring the epic's central struggle of the Pandavas and the Kauravas.

title: Navajeevana
subTitle: Bringing the best in cinema.

subTitle: Bringing the best in cinema.

title: Teleshopping
subTitle: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

title: Durga Pooje
subTitle: Kaveri, a devotee of Goddess Durga, is happily married to Rajshekar. Their peaceful life is shattered when the evil Chanderpal manages to create a rift between them and Rajshekar abandons Kaveri.

title: Dhani
subTitle: Two despicable brothers murder their employer and throw his son into the river. When the boy survives and grows up, he decides to take revenge.

title: Rangasthalam
subTitle: A young man suffering from a hearing defect rises up against a corrupt local leader along with the help of his fearless older brother. Together, they defy tyranny in a fight for justice and freedom.

title: Guru Brahma
subTitle: Guru and Brahma, two brothers belonging to a lineage of twins on their paternal side, deliberate upon marriage as their family insists.

title: Gajapathi Garvabanga
subTitle: Kishore falls in love with Sowmya, a runaway bride. However, Sowmya's father does not like Kishore and tries to separate them.

title: Thayi Nadu
subTitle: Thayi Nadu

title: Hunnimeya Rathiriyalli
subTitle: After a curse, a young man transforms into a snake on every full moon. When he accidentally kills the woman he likes, her brother sets out to uncover the truth.

title: Looti Gang
subTitle: Looti Gang

title: Teleshopping
subTitle: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

title: Kempaiah I.P.S
subTitle: Kempaiah is an honest IPS officer who is against the evils of society and is determined to reform criminals. However, corrupt politicians and government servants try to stop him.

title: Kanasina Rani
subTitle: Raja meets Prabha and creates a false impression of being wealthy to win her heart but a sudden turn of events make him realise that honesty is important in a relationship.

title: Navibbaru Namagibbaru
subTitle: In a bid to turn their lives around, two lookalikes, who have different personalities, switch places to find true love in their partners.

title: Anjada Gandu
subTitle: A reckless hellion ignores his father's advice and squanders his money. Subsequently, in order to discipline him, his father sends him to his strict army friend.

title: Banda Namma Sarrainodu
subTitle: An ex-army vigilante attacks corrupt individuals who have escaped justice. However, he faces a dilemma when his lover agrees to marry him only if he gives up his vigilante ways.
